common.noProviders: No discovered AI providers. Configure sources in Settings.

prompts.title: Prompts
prompts.description: Your most expensive prompts by attributed tokens.

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.description: Browse and drill into individual sessions.

tools.title: Tools
tools.description: Tool calls and the result tokens they returned.

skills.title: Skills & commands
skills.description: Slash commands you ran vs. Skill tools Claude invoked.
skills.noActivity: No skill or slash-command activity in range.

subagents.title: Subagents & orchestration
subagents.description: Spend split by agent kind (main / auto-compaction / subagent) and client entrypoint.

productivity.title: Productivity
productivity.description: Estimated focus, flow, warm-up, commits, assistant activity, and PR impact from local sources.
productivity.noData: No productivity data in range. Sync commits, PRs, calendar events, or assistant activity first.
productivity.noCalendarOverlap: No calendar overlap was found. Connect Google Calendar to compare meetings and productive output.
productivity.noCommits: No commits in range. Local git history is read from discovered workspaces.
productivity.focusTrend: Estimated focus active span and flow trend
productivity.noWarmup: No post-meeting warm-up samples in range.
productivity.noFocusBlocks: No focus blocks found in this range.
productivity.noPrCorrelation: No PR correlation data. Sync GitHub PRs to populate this view.
productivity.noSyncedPrs: No synced pull requests in range.
productivity.name: Name
productivity.focusNote: Focus, flow, meeting impact, and warm-up are estimated from local timestamps. DORA and PR metrics use source-backed fields when available.

pullRequests.title: Pull Requests
pullRequests.description: Review queue health, deterministic rules, and opt-in AI insights for synced pull requests.

aiImpact.title: AI Impact
aiImpact.description: Utilization, code share, cost and ROI of AI coding tools — measured from real token/session data, then correlated with delivery.
aiImpact.noData: No AI-impact data yet. Scan AI sessions and commits (and optionally connect GitHub) first.
aiImpact.aiLinesNote: AI lines = lines in AI-assisted commits (commit-level attribution, not per-line provenance).
aiImpact.noCost: No priced AI usage in range.
aiImpact.costProjectNote: Cost is per provider/model and not attributable per repo, so project rows show delivery only.
aiImpact.correlationNote: Pearson r over the daily series (vs the prior equal-length window). Directional, not causal.

dora.title: DORA
dora.description: Individual and repo-level DORA views from local git plus synced GitHub PR and deployment data.
dora.noData: No DORA data yet. Sync commits and optionally GitHub PRs/deployments first.
dora.noRepoComparison: No repo comparison rows in range.
dora.noLeadTime: No merged PR lead-time samples in range.
dora.prCycleTimeNote: Pickup = open → first review, Review = first review → merge. Coding time isn't captured yet (needs feature-branch first-commit data).
dora.noPrTimestamps: No merged PRs with timestamps in range.
dora.noIncidents: No incidents in range. Label GitHub issues "incident" to populate exact MTTR and change-failure rate.
dora.incidentNote: Reverts/hotfixes and failed deploys are proxies; connect GitHub and label incident issues "incident" for exact MTTR and change-failure rate.

allocation.title: Allocation
allocation.description: Investment split (feature / fix / KTLO / chore) inferred from conventional-commit prefixes.
allocation.categoryNote: Categories come from conventional-commit prefixes; commits without a recognized type fall into "Other".

devex.title: DevEx
devex.description: A voluntary local self-pulse, correlated with your hard metrics. Directional, not causal — and never leaves your machine.
devex.alreadyLogged: You already logged a pulse today. Add another any time.
devex.noSentiment: Log a few pulses to see sentiment trends.
devex.correlationNote: Pearson r over the daily series; shown only at n ≥ 3. Directional, not causal.

team.title: Team
team.description: Per-author contribution and DORA-lite, grouped by commit-author email (local git).
team.singleAuthorNote: Only one commit author in range — per-author views are most useful on shared repos.
team.author: Author
team.changeFailureNote: Change-failure is a revert/hotfix proxy from commit subjects; lead time and deploy frequency per author need PR-author data (not yet wired).

tips.title: Tips
tips.description: Rule-based suggestions to cut token spend.
tips.noTips: No tips right now — nothing to flag in this range.

rtk.title: RTK
rtk.description: Token savings from the RTK CLI.
rtk.installed: RTK detected — detailed savings views arrive in a follow-up.
rtk.notInstalled: RTK is not installed on this machine, so there are no savings to show.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Integrations, AI sources, plan and scan locations.

nav.sourcesDesc: Which local AI coding tools to scan.

profile.themeHint: Light, dark, or follow your OS.
profile.defaultRangeHint: Starting range when the app loads.

onboarding.title: Setup wizard
onboarding.description: Run the first-run setup again any time — pick your copilots, connect GitHub and your calendar, and configure the initial scan + backfill. It opens as a full-screen flow.

provider.description: Local CLI sessions scanned for tokens, tools and cost.

integrations.noRepoScope: no repo scope — private repos won't sync
integrations.tokenNote: A fine-grained or classic PAT with read access to your repos. Stored encrypted at rest; used only to fetch pull requests, releases, and Actions runs.
integrations.connectPrompt: Connect an integration to enrich your dashboard.
integrations.githubDesc: Pull requests, releases, and CI runs for your repos.
integrations.calendarDesc: Overlay meetings on your activity and measure their impact.

googleConnect.finishSignIn: Finish sign-in in the opened tab, then click Sync.
googleConnect.couldNotStart: Could not start sign-in — set GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID / GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET
googleConnect.oauthNote: OAuth via a loopback redirect; requires GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID / GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET on the server. Tokens are stored encrypted at rest and used only to read event times.

ingestGate.indexingBody: Building your dashboard from your local sessions. This page fills in as soon as the first data lands.
ingestGate.noDataBody: Run the initial scan and connect your sources to populate your dashboard.

ingestStatus.title: Data ingest
ingestStatus.subtitle: Seeding, backfill and real-time indexing status.
